name: Ice Cream Sundae Cups
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Strawberry or Chocolate Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix vanilla wafer crumbs, pecans, sugar, and melted butter in a small bowl. Divide the mixture equally among cups of a mini-muffin tin. Press the mixture evenly onto the sides and bottoms of the cups. Bake in a preheated 375-degree oven until beginning to brown, about 6 to 8 minutes. While still warm, gently press the insides of the cups with a teaspoon to enlarge openings; allow to cool.
2. Place banana slices in the bottoms of the cups. Fill each cup with ice cream. Put the muffin tins in gallon-size Ziploc freezer bags and freeze for no longer than 1 month.
3. Before serving, top with whipped cream and cherries if desired.
